nodes.name: Schedule: 9:00 AM
nodes.notes: Ejecuta todos los días a las 9:00 AM (Bolivia UTC-4)

parameters.query:
SELECT
    -- Estados (todos)
    COUNT(*) as total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completado') as completadas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'nueva') as nuevas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactivo_pending') as inactivo_pending,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactivo_confirmed') as inactivo_confirmed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'excluido_operacion') as excluidas_operacion,

    -- Matching
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE id_proyecto_master IS NOT NULL AND status = 'completado') as matcheadas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE id_proyecto_master IS NULL AND status = 'completado') as sin_match,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE nombre_edificio IS NOT NULL AND nombre_edificio != '' AND status = 'completado') as con_nombre,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE zona IS NOT NULL AND zona != '' AND status = 'completado') as con_zona,

    -- Pendientes enrich (nuevas venta)
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'nueva' AND tipo_operacion = 'venta') as pendientes_enrich,

    -- Actividad 24h
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fecha_creacion >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as creadas_24h,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fecha_enrichment >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as enriquecidas_24h,

    -- Calidad: Scores (solo completadas)
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE score_calidad_dato >= 95 AND status = 'completado') as score_alto,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE score_calidad_dato >= 85 AND score_calidad_dato < 95 AND status = 'completado') as score_medio,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE score_calidad_dato < 85 AND status = 'completado') as score_bajo,

    -- Calidad: Campos faltantes (solo completadas)
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (zona IS NULL OR zona = '') AND status = 'completado') as sin_zona,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dormitorios IS NULL AND status = 'completado') as sin_dormitorios,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (nombre_edificio IS NULL OR nombre_edificio = '') AND status = 'completado') as sin_nombre,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE precio_usd IS NULL AND status = 'completado') as sin_precio,

    -- Revisión humana: Discrepancias merge
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (
      (discrepancias_detectadas->'gps'->>'flag' IS NOT NULL AND discrepancias_detectadas->'gps'->>'flag' != 'null') OR
      (discrepancias_detectadas->'area'->>'flag' IS NOT NULL AND discrepancias_detectadas->'area'->>'flag' != 'null') OR
      (discrepancias_detectadas->'precio'->>'flag' IS NOT NULL AND discrepancias_detectadas->'precio'->>'flag' != 'null')
    )) as discrepancias_merge,

    -- Excluidas matching
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE es_para_matching = false AND status = 'completado') as excluidas_matching,

    -- Alquiler (v3.0)
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tipo_operacion = 'alquiler' AND status = 'completado') as alq_completadas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tipo_operacion = 'alquiler' AND fecha_creacion >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as alq_creadas_24h,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tipo_operacion = 'alquiler' AND datos_json_enrichment->'llm_output' IS NOT NULL) as alq_llm_enriched,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tipo_operacion = 'alquiler' AND id_proyecto_master IS NOT NULL AND status = 'completado') as alq_matcheadas,

    -- LLM Enrichment Venta (v3.0)
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE datos_json_enrichment->'llm_output' IS NOT NULL AND tipo_operacion = 'venta') as llm_enriched_venta,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE datos_json_enrichment->'llm_output' IS NULL AND tipo_operacion = 'venta' AND datos_json_enrichment IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(datos_json_enrichment->>'descripcion') >= 30) as llm_pendientes_venta,

    -- Health: timestamps
    MAX(fecha_enrichment) as ultimo_enrichment,
    MAX(fecha_merge) as ultimo_merge,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(fecha_enrichment))) / 3600, 1) as horas_sin_enrichment,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(fecha_merge))) / 3600, 1) as horas_sin_merge,

    -- Health: Discovery (hubo nuevas en 26h?)
    CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fecha_creacion >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours') > 0 THEN true ELSE false END as discovery_ok,

    -- Health: TC Dinámico (workflow corrió en 26h?)
    (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(finished_at) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours' THEN true ELSE false END
     FROM workflow_executions WHERE workflow_name = 'tc_dinamico_binance') as tc_dinamico_ok,

    -- Health: Enrichment LLM Venta (v3.0)
    (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(finished_at) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours' THEN true ELSE false END
     FROM workflow_executions WHERE workflow_name = 'enrichment_llm_venta') as enrichment_llm_venta_ok,
    (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(finished_at))) / 3600, 1)
     FROM workflow_executions WHERE workflow_name = 'enrichment_llm_venta') as horas_sin_enrichment_llm,

    -- Health: Pipeline Alquiler (v3.0)
    (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(finished_at) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours' THEN true ELSE false END
     FROM workflow_executions WHERE workflow_name IN ('discovery_remax_alquiler', 'discovery_c21_alquiler')) as discovery_alquiler_ok,
    (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(finished_at) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours' THEN true ELSE false END
     FROM workflow_executions WHERE workflow_name = 'enrichment_alquiler') as enrichment_alquiler_ok,
    (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(finished_at) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours' THEN true ELSE false END
     FROM workflow_executions WHERE workflow_name = 'merge_alquiler') as merge_alquiler_ok,
    (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(finished_at) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours' THEN true ELSE false END
     FROM workflow_executions WHERE workflow_name = 'verificador_alquiler') as verificador_alquiler_ok

  FROM propiedades_v2

nodes.name: PG: Stats Propiedades
nodes.notes: Estadísticas de propiedades: estados, calidad, discrepancias, LLM enrichment

parameters.query:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) as sugerencias_total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as sugerencias_24h,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE estado = 'aprobado' AND fecha_revision >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as aprobadas_24h,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE estado = 'rechazado' AND fecha_revision >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as rechazadas_24h,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE estado = 'pendiente') as pendientes_matching,

    -- Health: Matching Nocturno (corrió en últimas 26h)
    (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(finished_at) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
     FROM workflow_executions
     WHERE workflow_name = 'matching_nocturno'
    ) as matching_nocturno_hoy

  FROM matching_sugerencias

nodes.name: PG: Stats Matching
nodes.notes: Estadísticas de matching y verificación de ejecución nocturna

parameters.query:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) as total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activo = true) as activos,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE gps_verificado_google = true) as gps_verificado,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE google_place_id IS NOT NULL) as con_place_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activo = true AND desarrollador IS NOT NULL) as con_desarrollador,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activo = true AND desarrollador IS NULL) as sin_desarrollador,
    COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM proyectos_pendientes_google WHERE estado = 'pendiente'), 0) as pendientes_google
  FROM proyectos_master

SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM propiedades_v2 WHERE id_proyecto_master IS NULL AND status = 'completado' AND es_para_matching = TRUE) as huerfanas_activas
  FROM propiedades_v2 LIMIT 1

SELECT
  (SELECT valor FROM config_global WHERE clave = 'tipo_cambio_paralelo') as tc_paralelo,
  (SELECT valor FROM config_global WHERE clave = 'tipo_cambio_oficial') as tc_oficial,
  (SELECT MAX(fecha_cambio) FROM auditoria_tipo_cambio) as ultimo_cambio_tc,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tc_binance_historial WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as consultas_binance_24h,
  (SELECT MAX(timestamp) FROM tc_binance_historial) as ultima_consulta_binance

nodes.name: PG: Stats TC
nodes.notes: Estadísticas de tipo de cambio y Binance

parameters.query:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN workflow_name IN ('discovery_century21', 'discovery_remax') THEN 'discovery'
       WHEN workflow_name IN ('discovery_c21_alquiler', 'discovery_remax_alquiler') THEN 'discovery_alquiler'
       WHEN workflow_name IN ('discovery_casas_terrenos_c21', 'discovery_casas_terrenos_remax') THEN 'discovery_casas_terrenos'
       ELSE workflow_name END as workflow_name,
  MAX(finished_at) as last_run,
  BOOL_OR(finished_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '26 hours') as ran_last_26h
FROM workflow_executions
WHERE workflow_name IN (
  'discovery_century21', 'discovery_remax',
  'enrichment', 'enrichment_llm_venta', 'merge', 'matching_nocturno',
  'discovery_c21_alquiler', 'discovery_remax_alquiler',
  'enrichment_alquiler', 'merge_alquiler', 'verificador_alquiler',
  'discovery_casas_terrenos_c21', 'discovery_casas_terrenos_remax', 'enrichment_casas_terrenos',
  'auditoria_diaria', 'tc_dinamico_binance', 'verificador'
)
GROUP BY CASE WHEN workflow_name IN ('discovery_century21', 'discovery_remax') THEN 'discovery'
              WHEN workflow_name IN ('discovery_c21_alquiler', 'discovery_remax_alquiler') THEN 'discovery_alquiler'
              WHEN workflow_name IN ('discovery_casas_terrenos_c21', 'discovery_casas_terrenos_remax') THEN 'discovery_casas_terrenos'
              ELSE workflow_name END;

nodes.name: PG: Stats Workflows
nodes.notes: Health de todos los workflows activos (venta + alquiler + global)

nodes.name: Code: Consolidar Reporte
nodes.notes: Consolidar métricas, construir mensaje Slack y preparar snapshot

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO auditoria_snapshots (
  fecha, props_total, props_completadas, props_nuevas, props_nuevas_venta,
  props_inactivas, props_inactivo_pending, props_inactivo_confirmed,
  props_matcheadas, props_sin_match, props_con_nombre, props_con_zona,
  props_creadas_24h, props_enriquecidas_24h, pct_match_completadas, pct_nombre_completadas,
  score_alto, score_medio, score_bajo, pct_alto, pct_medio, pct_bajo,
  sin_zona, sin_dormitorios, sin_nombre, discrepancias_merge, excluidas_matching,
  match_total, match_24h, match_aprobadas_24h, match_rechazadas_24h, match_pendientes,
  pendientes_sinmatch, tasa_aprobacion_24h,
  proy_total, proy_activos, proy_gps_verificado, proy_con_place_id, proy_pendientes_google,
  pct_gps_verificado, horas_sin_enrichment, horas_sin_merge, matching_nocturno_ok,
  discovery_ok, enrichment_ok, merge_ok, tc_dinamico_ok, export_7am_ok,
  supervisor_match_ok, supervisor_sinmatch_ok
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.snapshot.fecha }}',
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_total }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_completadas }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_nuevas }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_nuevas_venta }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_inactivas }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_inactivo_pending }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_inactivo_confirmed }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_matcheadas }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_sin_match }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_con_nombre }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_con_zona }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_creadas_24h }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.props_enriquecidas_24h }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.pct_match_completadas }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.pct_nombre_completadas }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.score_alto }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.score_medio }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.score_bajo }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.pct_alto }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.pct_medio }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.pct_bajo }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.sin_zona }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.sin_dormitorios }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.sin_nombre }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.discrepancias_merge }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.excluidas_matching }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.match_total }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.match_24h }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.match_aprobadas_24h }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.match_rechazadas_24h }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.match_pendientes }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.huerfanas_activas }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.tasa_aprobacion_24h === null ? 'NULL' : $json.snapshot.tasa_aprobacion_24h }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.proy_total }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.proy_activos }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.proy_gps_verificado }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.proy_con_place_id }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.proy_pendientes_google }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.pct_gps_verificado }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.horas_sin_enrichment }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.horas_sin_merge }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.matching_nocturno_ok }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.discovery_ok }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.enrichment_ok }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.merge_ok }},
  {{ $json.snapshot.tc_dinamico_ok }},
  true,
  true,
  true
)
ON CONFLICT (fecha) DO UPDATE SET
  props_total = EXCLUDED.props_total,
  props_completadas = EXCLUDED.props_completadas,
  props_nuevas = EXCLUDED.props_nuevas,
  props_nuevas_venta = EXCLUDED.props_nuevas_venta,
  props_inactivas = EXCLUDED.props_inactivas,
  props_inactivo_pending = EXCLUDED.props_inactivo_pending,
  props_inactivo_confirmed = EXCLUDED.props_inactivo_confirmed,
  props_matcheadas = EXCLUDED.props_matcheadas,
  props_sin_match = EXCLUDED.props_sin_match,
  props_con_nombre = EXCLUDED.props_con_nombre,
  props_con_zona = EXCLUDED.props_con_zona,
  props_creadas_24h = EXCLUDED.props_creadas_24h,
  props_enriquecidas_24h = EXCLUDED.props_enriquecidas_24h,
  pct_match_completadas = EXCLUDED.pct_match_completadas,
  pct_nombre_completadas = EXCLUDED.pct_nombre_completadas,
  score_alto = EXCLUDED.score_alto,
  score_medio = EXCLUDED.score_medio,
  score_bajo = EXCLUDED.score_bajo,
  pct_alto = EXCLUDED.pct_alto,
  pct_medio = EXCLUDED.pct_medio,
  pct_bajo = EXCLUDED.pct_bajo,
  sin_zona = EXCLUDED.sin_zona,
  sin_dormitorios = EXCLUDED.sin_dormitorios,
  sin_nombre = EXCLUDED.sin_nombre,
  discrepancias_merge = EXCLUDED.discrepancias_merge,
  excluidas_matching = EXCLUDED.excluidas_matching,
  match_total = EXCLUDED.match_total,
  match_24h = EXCLUDED.match_24h,
  match_aprobadas_24h = EXCLUDED.match_aprobadas_24h,
  match_rechazadas_24h = EXCLUDED.match_rechazadas_24h,
  match_pendientes = EXCLUDED.match_pendientes,
  pendientes_sinmatch = EXCLUDED.pendientes_sinmatch,
  tasa_aprobacion_24h = EXCLUDED.tasa_aprobacion_24h,
  proy_total = EXCLUDED.proy_total,
  proy_activos = EXCLUDED.proy_activos,
  proy_gps_verificado = EXCLUDED.proy_gps_verificado,
  proy_con_place_id = EXCLUDED.proy_con_place_id,
  proy_pendientes_google = EXCLUDED.proy_pendientes_google,
  pct_gps_verificado = EXCLUDED.pct_gps_verificado,
  horas_sin_enrichment = EXCLUDED.horas_sin_enrichment,
  horas_sin_merge = EXCLUDED.horas_sin_merge,
  matching_nocturno_ok = EXCLUDED.matching_nocturno_ok,
  discovery_ok = EXCLUDED.discovery_ok,
  enrichment_ok = EXCLUDED.enrichment_ok,
  merge_ok = EXCLUDED.merge_ok,
  tc_dinamico_ok = EXCLUDED.tc_dinamico_ok,
  export_7am_ok = EXCLUDED.export_7am_ok,
  supervisor_match_ok = EXCLUDED.supervisor_match_ok,
  supervisor_sinmatch_ok = EXCLUDED.supervisor_sinmatch_ok
